name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Atlanta, GA's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at Ponce De Leon Ave offers fast car title loans with flexible terms and same-day approval.
description_long:
Located at 1163 Ponce De Leon Ave NE in Atlanta, GA, this Montana Capital Car Title Loans branch provides quick car title loans to residents throughout the area. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM, giving Atlanta customers flexible access to emergency financing solutions.

This Atlanta location specializes in car title loans, allowing residents to leverage their vehicle equity for fast cash. Whether you need same-day funds or flexible repayment options, the staff at this Georgia branch can discuss your options over the phone at +1 727-273-7099 or in person during business hours.

For Atlanta residents facing unexpected expenses, this Montana Capital Car Title Loans branch on Ponce De Leon Ave offers a straightforward alternative to traditional lenders. Bring your valid ID, proof of vehicle ownership, and vehicle details to complete your application quickly.
address: 1163 Ponce De Leon Ave NE a, Atlanta, GA 30306

company_info.headquarters: 1163 Ponce De Leon Ave NE a, Atlanta, GA 30306

pros: Same-day or next-day funding with online application completed in under 5 minutes
Loan amounts up to $50,000, serving both small ($100-$2,000) and larger cash needs
No credit check required; explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit and bankruptcy history
Borrowers keep their vehicle and continue driving during the entire loan term
4.5 Google rating with customer reviews praising fast processing, friendly staff, and clear communication
24/7 online access and same-day in-person service at multiple locations
Competitive rates relative to other title lenders, per customer testimonials
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedule disclosed on website—borrowers cannot compare costs before applying
Title loans are inherently high-cost products; typical rates and fees far exceed standard personal loans and credit products
Funds delivered as bank check (not cash), which may delay actual access for some borrowers
Limited detail on state-specific regulations, loan terms, or penalties for missed payments
No information about payment flexibility, loan extensions, or what happens if the vehicle is damaged or totaled
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or recent bankruptcy who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies needing $500–$5,000 quickly and willing to accept high costs
Borrowers with stable income who are confident in their ability to repay within the loan term
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for vehicle owners with poor credit facing genuine short-term emergencies who can confidently repay within their loan term. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt products with undisclosed rates; borrowers should calculate total repayment costs and explore alternatives before committing to this option.
services: Online title loan application and pre-approval in under 5 minutes
Same-day funding via direct deposit or check
Title loan amounts from $100 to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
In-person loan processing at multiple physical locations
24/7 online access to apply and manage loans
Payment plan customization based on customer needs
Vehicle title retention during loan repayment
Title return upon final loan payment
Text reminders for payment due dates
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 1163 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA. Get fast car title loans with same-day approval.
